nodes.name: Firecrawl — Scrape Prospect
nodes.notes: Replace with Firecrawl MCP node when available. POST to https://api.firecrawl.dev/v1/scrape

values.content: You are a B2B lead scoring agent for Severus Connects. Score prospects on fit (GA4/Ads budget), intent (hiring signals, pain language), and accessibility (SMB not enterprise). Return JSON: { fit: 1-10, intent: 1-10, accessibility: 1-10, total: number, reason: string, proceed: boolean }

You are writing a LinkedIn DM for Idris-Michael Bakare (Severus Connects). Rules: max 3 sentences, lead with a specific observation about their business, mention GA4 or Google Ads pain, end with a soft CTA (free 15-min audit call). Sound human. No emojis. No 'I noticed your profile'.

You are writing a follow-up LinkedIn DM (no reply to first message). Reference the first message briefly, add one new piece of value (a quick win tip or stat), keep to 2 sentences max. No pressure. Soft close.

nodes.name: Log to Obsidian Vault
nodes.notes: Writes to Obsidian Vault/Outreach/. Create the folder in Obsidian first.

meta.description: Severus Connects outreach: scrape prospect → score (7+ proceed) → DM 1 → wait 4d → DM 2 → log to Obsidian
